message:
🌱 Add cert-manager: Set a CommonName when using ingress-shim  mission (#1225)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cert-manager-2237-set-a-commonname-when-using-ingress-shim",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cert-manager: Set a CommonName when using ingress-shim ",
+    "description": "Set a CommonName when using ingress-shim . Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cert-manager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cert-manager version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nhelm list -n cert-manager 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cert-manager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cert-manager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cert-manager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get configmap -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager\n```\nIf the CA requires the common name  to be provided then we cannot use the ingress resource with just this `cert-manager.io/issuer` annotation since the common name is not provided to Vault."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Set a CommonName when using ingress-shim ",
+        "description": "Some issuers/consumers need a common name set. This allows ingress-shim users to set one using the CN annotation on ingress resources. ~~It also implements a defaulting for a CN which only applies on ingress-shim created resources.~~\nSeveral things to have a think about:\n~~1. is setting the CN by\n```yaml\napiVersion: extensions/v1beta1\nkind: Ingress\nmetadata:\n  annotations:\n    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: internal-ingress\n    cert-manager.io/issuer: vault-issuer\n    cert-manager.io/common-name: foo.example.com\n  labels:\n...\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Set a CommonName when using ingress-shim \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Some issuers/consumers need a common name set. This allows ingress-shim users to set one using the CN annotation on ingress resources. ~~It also implements a defaulting for a CN which only applies on ingress-shim created resources.~~\nSeveral things to have a think about:\n~~1. is setting the CN by default a good idea?~~\n~~1.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1\nkind: Ingress\nmetadata:\n  annotations:\n    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: internal-ingress\n    cert-manager.io/issuer: vault-issuer\n    cert-manager.io/common-name: foo.example.com\n  labels:\n..."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cert-manager",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cert-manager"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Ingress",
+      "Secret"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",

+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/issues/2237",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pull/3085"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 8,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },

+}
